lastReleaseMessage: library grid: drop minmax floor from 78px to 64px so it doesn't collapse to one column in narrow editor panels; add min-width:0 safeguard

barRaise.topFinding: Third consecutive bar-raise with zero actions closed and zero commits since v0.15.8 (2026-05-26). Every artifact is byte-identical to yesterday: 37 em-dashes across six public files, html2canvas still CDN-loaded, PROJECT_SPEC sections 4.4/4.5/11 still pre-v0.15, README still pitches 20 herbs vs a live 199, and write-dashboard-status.ps1 still clobbers barRaise and audit findings on every release. The audit-loop-integrity finding climbed to HIGH: the canonical audit, both prior bar-raises, and their fixes are all untracked, unqueued, and unconsumed, so the daily review apparatus is running open-loop. With that HIGH joining the standing public-voice em-dash HIGH, the verdict steps from needs-attention to at-risk. The running app is healthy; the auto-remediation pipeline around it is not self-correcting and needs a human to drain it once or fix the handoff.
